summary: Backend testing of MindTrack music upload (private user uploads) and music request features. All 16 tests passed against the public preview URL. Covers upload success, 5 MB size limit (413), owner-only data access (403 for other user), ownership isolation in listing, owner delete, non-admin cannot delete admin tracks, music request create/list/patch/delete lifecycle, admin-only listing of all requests, and empty message validation (400). Deprecated packages detected in frontend: expo-av (SDK 54 removal) — should migrate to expo-audio/expo-video (not directly in scope of this iteration but flagged from expo logs).

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecated: 'Expo AV has been deprecated and will be removed in SDK 54. Use the expo-audio and expo-video packages'. Seen in /var/log/supervisor/expo.err.log — likely used in the music player screen for playback. Reference: search frontend/app for expo-av imports.
Deprecated shadow* style props warning ('use boxShadow'). Multiple occurrences in expo.err.log — frontend uses shadowColor/shadowOffset/etc. Should migrate to boxShadow for web/RN compatibility.

test_results_detail.test_02_list_music_includes_own_track: PASS — GET /api/music shows uploaded track with is_mine=true, data_base64 excluded from list
test_results_detail.test_04_upload_too_large_returns_413: PASS — 8.4M-char base64 rejected with 413 'File too large'
test_results_detail.test_05_other_user_cannot_get_data: PASS — Second user gets 403 'Not allowed' on first user's track
test_results_detail.test_06_other_user_list_does_not_include: PASS — GET /api/music for user2 does not include user1's private track
test_results_detail.test_07_owner_can_delete_track: PASS — DELETE /api/music/{id} returns 200 and track removed from list
test_results_detail.test_08_non_admin_cannot_delete_admin_tr: PASS — Non-admin gets 403 on admin-uploaded (owner=None) tracks (admin tracks were present)
test_results_detail.test_10_list_mine_includes_pending: PASS — GET /api/music/requests/mine shows request with status='pending'
test_results_detail.test_12_admin_can_list_all: PASS — Admin GET /api/music/requests returns request in list
test_results_detail.test_15_user_deletes_own_request: PASS — DELETE returns 200, request no longer in /mine
test_results_detail.test_16_empty_message_rejected: PASS — POST with whitespace-only message returns 400

action_items: (Non-blocking, from expo logs) Migrate expo-av usage in music player to expo-audio (SDK 54 removal).
(Non-blocking) Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow in frontend styles.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py music endpoints look correct: 5 MB check uses approx byte calc from base64 length, ownership checks are consistent between /music/{id}/data and DELETE, list_music excludes _id and data_base64, and admin-only checks are present on POST /music/upload, PATCH /music/requests/{id}, and GET /music/requests.

Ownership check in delete_music (line 1644) uses `owner and is_owner` — this correctly prevents a regular user from matching when owner=None (admin track), but note the same expression means an admin whose user_id happens to equal owner still works via is_admin short-circuit. Behavior is correct.
MusicUploadIn has no field length limits on title at Pydantic level — server truncates to [:120] for user uploads but not for admin uploads. Minor inconsistency, not a bug.
seed_data_creation: Created two ephemeral users (test_music_<ts>@example.com, test_music2_<ts>@example.com) via /api/auth/register. Track and music request created during tests were deleted by the tests themselves. Users remain in DB but are harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Music upload + music request backend endpoints (server.py lines 1528-1751) are fully working. Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_music_features.py for regression. BASE_URL is read from EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Test users are created fresh per run using a timestamp, so no cleanup coupling. Admin credentials from /app/memory/test_credentials.md work.
